content.rendered:
Shanghai World of Packaging 2023(SWOP 2023 Shanghai)

As a member of the world’s leading packaging exhibition interpack (which is one of the most influential exhibitions in the packaging industry), SWOP attracts Many well-known packaging companies and professional audiences from  home and abroad actively participated. This year 2023, SWOP will be held grandly at the Shanghai New International Expo Center （SNIEC） from November 22-24th, 2023. This exhibition is expected to have an exhibition area of more than 62,000 square meters, attracting nearly 900 Chinese and foreign exhibitors from around the world. swop is committed to providing the packaging industry with a highly broad vision and new trends in the packaging industry with international characteristics, helping to promote the practical application of innovative ideas and allowing packaging professionals to become efficient packaging practitioners.

SWOP Exhibitors List

we can find the swop Exhibitors list from the official website of the SWOP, Shanghai Npack is as one of the leading Exhibitors, mainly Exhibit the liquid filling machine,capping machine and industrial labeling machine

The Booth No. of Npack:W3A06

Date:22th to 24th Nov.2023

meanwhile, you can see the livestream of the exhibition on our KIWL 产品视频 livesteam and Npack Alibaba livesteam

What SWOP exhition brings you?

swop 2023 will bring many hot topics to the packaging industry, including international packaging trends, artificial intelligence driving sales, weight and volume reduction, moderate packaging, sustainable new materials, new food contact packaging regulations, digitalization and smart packaging, etc. Explore packaging Innovative solutions for the industry. Packaging design and production.

swop 2023 will hold more than ten industry forums, new technology exchange meetings, etc. At the same time, it will also plan theme exhibition areas, packaging highlights, and colorful activities to present a new look to the packaging industry. The exhibition aims to help upstream and downstream packaging companies explore greater business opportunities and write another exciting chapter for industry peers.

About Shanghai World of Packaging (swop)

Shanghai World of Packaging is co-organized by Messe Düsseldorf Shanghai and Adsale Exhibition Services Co., Ltd., and will be held annually. swop will focus on such themes as Artificial Intelligence, sustainable packaging, smart factory, printing and labeling, processing and packaging components, package container production, e-commerce and logistics packaging, innovative packaging materials, packaging design, personalized packaging, packaging light-weighting, packaging design, etc., to provide innovative omni channel packaging solutions and showcase intelligent processing and packaging production lines. At the same time, special exhibition areas and distinctive zones will be available at the expo to cover all the trending topics in the packaging industry.

Note:Above information is from SWOP official website: www.swop-online.com,shanghai npack is one of the Exhibitors.
